title: tui /me command wraps text in CTCP delimiters stripped by strip_unsafe
description: The /me handler (tui/src/event.rs line 1023) wraps the action text in IRC CTCP delimiters (\x01ACTION ...\x01). The strip_unsafe() filter on the receive path removes control characters including \x01, so the delimiters are stripped and recipients see the raw action text without any indication it was a /me emote. Either remove the CTCP wrapping and use a dedicated message type/field for emote actions, or adjust strip_unsafe() to preserve the intended presentation.
